{{CargoOrgan
|name=Izanami's Fish Tail
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10899
|idx=110
|description=This gorgeous fishtail is restored with biological weapon technologies. It resembles Izanami's Fish Tail and has outstanding performances.
|skill=
|hp=2720
|def=226
|atk=204
|rush=368
|gene1={race} FTH +200
|gene2=All ELMT DMG +40
|gene3=All ELMT RES +40
|gene4=Goldfish Incident currency gains +4%
|gene5=Restore 800 HP each round
|gene6=Water DMG +12 per 10 Species Wars
Species War Enlisted: 300/300
|gene7=Goldfish Incident currency gains +4% (Awakened)
|}}
